---
title: "tobacco_and_nicotine_use"
subtitle: "`tobacco_and_nicotine_use`"
description: "tobacco_and_nicotine_use"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/tobacco_and_nicotine_use/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                  | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|-----------------------|------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`               | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                    |
| `center`              | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `tabac_smoking_types` | tabac_smoking_types          | string | Participant's use of tobacco products (cigarettes, cigars, cigarillos, pipe, waterpipe). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                     |
| `tab_nicotine_types`  | tab_nicotine_types           | string | Participant's use of smokeless tobacco products (snus, nicotine pouches, chewing tobacco, tobacco lozenges). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `tabac_e_cigarettes`  | tabac_e_cigarettes           | string | Participant's use of e-cigarettes, vapes, or pod-based systems. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                              |
| `tabac_heat_not_burn` | tabac_heat_not_burn          | string | Participant's use of heated tobacco products (heat-not-burn products). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                       |
| `tabac_last_use`      | tabac_last_use               | string | Date or time since participant last used any tobacco or nicotine products. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                   |
| `tobacco_use_2`       | tobacco_use_2                | string | Parcitipant's wish to change their habit with tobacco or nicotine products. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                |

: Fields in the `tobacco_and_nicotine_use` resource.
